reply:
[[BLOCK:slide71_shape1]]
If your colleagues or reviewers prefer traditional solutions (and expect to see the term "regression"), use Generalized Regression (广义回归 (Generalized Regression)).  
If there are numerous predictor variables and Multi-collinearity (多重共线性 (Multi-collinearity)) exists, use Generalized Regression.  
In most cases, Elastic Net (弹性网络 (Elastic NET)) is preferred.  
If the data structure is wide, use Double LASSO (双重LASSO (Double Lasso)).  
In most cases, use Adaptive Elastic Net (自适应弹性网络 (Adaptive Elastic NET)).  
If the relationships are nonlinear, use artificial neural networks (to be discussed in Unit 7).
